# Chapter 9: Design reviews, certification, sign-off  (~80 pp)
- 9.1 The design review as engineering practice (12) · 9.2 PDR, CDR, FDR (12) · 9.3 Independent review and adversarial design (10) · 9.4 Certification regimes revisited at design depth (15) · 9.5 The signature: what an engineer commits when they sign (12) · 9.6 Failure section: rubber-stamp reviews and the legal aftermath (19)

**Archetype**: ethics, failure. **Project**: lead a design review of another reader's project (peer review); document the comments. **Exercises**: 15.
